2605.22456.title: Steins;Gate Drive: Semantic Safety Arbitration over Structured Futures for Latency-Decoupled LLM Planning
2605.22456.paper_summary: Cloud-hosted LLM driver agents provide useful semantic judgments, but their inference latency exceeds stepwise vehicle-control windows. Learned world models predict futures, but they usually keep future generation and action selection inside large coupled loops. We present SteinsGateDrive, a latency-decoupled planner-runtime architecture in which the worldline metaphor from the eponymous story names one plausible consequence of an intervention: the LLM selects counterfactual driving futures before the final control instant, and a runtime reuses the selected forecast only while safety contracts remain valid. The generator builds three world-line roles: alpha nominal ego-conditioned futures, beta interaction counterfactuals around nearby vehicles, and gamma hazard-stress futures such as braking, cut-ins, or blocked corridors. The selected branch becomes a typed StrategicForecast with horizon, validity/abort conditions, fallback, and authority. On a within-subject, matched-seed normal-highway protocol with 10 seeds and 20 steps, GPT-5.4 mini reduces effective lag from +3.07 s at 1-second horizon to -0.01 s at 4-second horizon while preserving the measured no-collision safety boundary. The architecture's safety contribution comes from the atom-predicate runtime check, not from the drift score, which functions as a refresh-frequency knob.
2605.22456.paper_summary_zh: 雲端托管的 LLM 驅動代理提供有用的語義判斷，但它們的推理延遲超過逐步車輛控制的時間窗口。學習的世界模型預測未來，但它們通常將未來生成和行動選擇保持在大型耦合循環內。我們提出 SteinsGateDrive，一種延遲解耦的規劃運行架構，其中來自同名故事的世界線隱喻命名了一個干預的合理後果：LLM 在最終控制瞬間之前選擇反事實駕駛未來，而運行時僅在安全合約仍然有效時重用所選預測。生成器構建三個世界線角色：alpha 名義自我條件的未來、beta 周圍車輛的互動反事實，以及 gamma 危險壓力未來，如剎車、切入或阻塞走廊。所選分支成為一個類型化的 StrategicForecast，具有時間範圍、有效性/中止條件、後備和權限。在一個內部受試者、匹配種子正常高速公路協議中，使用 10 個種子和 20 步，GPT-5.4 mini 將有效延遲從 1 秒時間範圍的 +3.07 秒減少到 4 秒時間範圍的 -0.01 秒，同時保持測量的無碰撞安全邊界。該架構的安全貢獻來自於原子謂詞運行時檢查，而不是漂移分數，後者作為刷新頻率的調節旋鈕。
2605.22456.author: Anjie Qiu et.al.
